stonewatch_to_ironridge.description: A shielded wagon road climbs north under contract guard.

ironridge_to_stonewatch.description: Freight wagons descend with ore, tools, and tired teamsters.

stonewatch_to_stormbreak.description: The route follows the river roads and coast ferries under posted harbor law.

stormbreak_to_stonewatch.description: Harbor clerks push travelers inland with the tide and the trade wagons.

stonewatch_to_valewood.description: A light wood-road carriage runs under clan markers and watch whistles.

valewood_to_stonewatch.description: Trail coaches roll outward when the ward-paths are judged clear enough.

stonewatch_to_emberfall.description: A warded escort line carries pilgrims, clerks, and trusted travelers toward the ash roads.
stonewatch_to_emberfall.requirement_note: Shrine escort is reserved for travelers trusted by the Shrine Keepers.

emberfall_to_stonewatch.description: Ward-bearers send travelers back toward the safer central roads.

stormbreak_to_valewood.description: The line joins ferry landings to forest coaches through a long, practical trade circuit.
stormbreak_to_valewood.requirement_note: Stormbreak's long circuit to Valewood opens only to Bronze-rank hunters or better whom the Merchant Guild will vouch for.

valewood_to_stormbreak.description: Forest wardens pass travelers into caravan hands once the deep roads give way to salt air.
valewood_to_stormbreak.requirement_note: Valewood sends travelers coastward only after the Forest Clans trust your tread and the Hunter Guild rates you Bronze or better.

ironridge_to_emberfall.description: A hard overland convoy joins hold steel to shrine fire under armed watch.
ironridge_to_emberfall.requirement_note: Ironridge reserves the Emberfall convoy for adventurers already trusted with C-rank frontier work.

emberfall_to_ironridge.description: Ward-clerks and caravan guards push north with sealed freight and fewer passengers than usual.
emberfall_to_ironridge.requirement_note: The Emberfall convoy north opens only to adventurers already cleared for C-rank work.

emberfall_to_vaultreach.description: A sealed ward-convoy makes the last approach under shrine law and written authority.
emberfall_to_vaultreach.requirement_note: Vaultreach transit is sealed until you have both B-rank standing and the Blackroot Ash Mark contract behind you.

vaultreach_to_emberfall.description: Return wagons leave under seal once the scribes have counted everyone back out.
